achievements.title: Aaaaaaaaaarrrrgh!!!
achievements.description: Experience the Short condition for the first time.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Unknown Face
achievements.description: In Stage A, find a hidden negative image in the initial room.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Mysterious Statue
achievements.description: In Stage A, take a look at a mysterious statue through a window.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: BOOM!
achievements.description: In Stage A, blast open the way to the 14th floor.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Yep... It's Still Mysterious
achievements.description: In Stage A, get a closer look at that mysterious statue.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: A Terrible Creature
achievements.description: In Stage A, discover a hidden image in a room with incubators.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Terminated
achievements.description: Eliminate Lem without using Skip, the Short condition or running.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: I Escaped from the Hospital Knowing Nothing but My Name
achievements.description: Complete Stage A.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Rion the Handyman
achievements.description: In Stage B, unlock the main hall.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Let's Do This!
achievements.description: In Stage B, successfully jump over the hole.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: An Artful Shortcut
achievements.description: In Stage B, discover a secret shortcut.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: A Dark Past
achievements.description: In Stage B, within Rion's room, locate a hidden image from Rion's childhood.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: We Will Always Be with You
achievements.description: In Stage B, open the jewellery box.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: How Does This Even Work?
achievements.description: In Stage B, uncover the hidden passageway beneath the pool table.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Room with a View
achievements.description: In Stage B, remove something from the pool that doesn't belong there and survey your handiwork from above.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Please Forgive Us
achievements.description: In Stage B, find a disturbing hidden image within the underground section.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Clipped Wings
achievements.description: Defeat Birdman without killing his duplicates or using Skip.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: What a Nightmare This Day Has Been!
achievements.description: Complete Stage B.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: What a Lovely Hotel
achievements.description: In Stage C, enter your charming hotel room.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Murder in the Hotel Babylon
achievements.description: In Stage C, find a hidden vision in the hotel reception.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Who's There?
achievements.description: In Stage C, tap out the password correctly.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Crime and Punishment
achievements.description: In Stage C, kill Rainheart without using Skip.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Lights Out
achievements.description: In Stage C, enter the hotel basement.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: The Furniture Strikes Back
achievements.description: Vanquish Rita without using Skip.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Nothing Can Stop Me Now!
achievements.description: Complete Stage C.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Where the Hell Did She Go?
achievements.description: In Stage D, find Lilia.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: I Can See My House from Here!
achievements.description: In Stage D, reach the 150th floor.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: In God's Hands
achievements.description: In Stage D, teleport to a mysterious location.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Be Still and Know
achievements.description: Beat Cain without moving, using Skip or taking damage.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: No Gods, No Masters
achievements.description: Destroy Dorothy without using a Recovery Capsule.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Too Late for Apologies
achievements.description: Complete Stage D and beat the game.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Get Out of My Way!
achievements.description: Complete Stage A in NG+ remaining in the Short condition the entire time.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: If Only I Didn't Have a Headache!
achievements.description: In Stage B in NG+, activate Short status in front of the car in the garage, then take the key from the car and find your mother's ring without using Delmator or Recovery Capsules.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: PPEC Side Effect
achievements.description: In Stage C in NG+, reach Rita while only walking in the normal condition and only running in the Short condition.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Mushroom Tower Massacre
achievements.description: In Stage D in NG+, activate the Short condition in front of a dormant shooter, then turn on the lamps and reach Cain before the HP indicator begins flashing and without using Delmator or Recovery Capsules.
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon

achievements.title: Untold Secret
achievements.description: Find all 62 cutscenes and watch the additional last one in Movie Preview (Stage C - Cell 19).
achievements.author: DimensionIceDragon
